prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-PH606H-6IN1-JEWELHAMMER-FBA Product Type: HAMMER_MALLET Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool 6 in 1 Multi-head Specialty Jewelry Hammer Description: When a lighter touch is desired, this is the ideal hammer for the job. This nylon headed hammer has six different shaped heads, in a "round the handle" pattern. You get pointed, cone, round, flat, and more. Just select the shape you want and start tapping.

The hammer weighs a sturdy but light .25 lbs, so your hands have control and do not feel any stress. Ten inches long overall with an ergonomic and non-slip wooden handle. Six heads on one hammer - like having six hammers in 1.

6 Styles of white nylon heads that include pointed, rounded, flat, and more. Great for metal shaping, crafting, hobby, clay, wax, sheet metal, jewelry making and more. Search Terms: Universal Tool 6 in 1 Multi-head Nylon Hammer Metal Shaping Crafting Hobby Clay Wax Sheet Jewelry Making Features: - SIX HAMMERS IN ONE - Having six heads on one hammer is like having 6 hammers in 1 - DIFFERENT STYLES - The six styles of white nylon heads that include pointed, rounded, flat, and more - MATERIAL - Made with an aluminum head it is meant to be softer than alloy metal allowing for better work with softer metals such as copper; will not marr metals as easily as denser alloys - SIZE - 9 inches long overall with an ergonomic and non-slip wooden handle - MULTI USE - Great for metal shaping, crafting, hobby, clay, wax, sheet metal, jewelry making and more === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 6-in-1 Jewelry Hammer Multi-Head Nylon

anthropic.title_differentiation: Six Interchangeable Nylon Heads, Metal Shaping, Jewelry Making, Crafting, Non-Slip Wooden Handle

openai.title_differentiation: Six Nylon Heads, Pointed Rounded Flat And More, Ergonomic Non-Slip Wooden Handle, Metal Shaping, Crafting
